tone: Polished, trustworthy, expert. Confident without being cold. Approachable authority.
personality: The trusted expert you'd refer your mom to. Knowledgeable, composed, results-focused. Lets the work speak for itself. Professional but never stuffy.
caption_style: Clean, structured, informative. Lead with a fact or result. Minimal emojis (1-2 max per post). Use line breaks for readability but keep it polished. End with a professional CTA.
email_style: Professional but warm. Proper grammar and punctuation. Clear value proposition in each email. Subject lines that communicate benefit, not hype. Sign off with full name and title.
